mappings.operational_role: Local event routing between Odin subsystems without external network
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin uses local semantic coordination for subsystem event routing.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin has a production semantic bus or external message broker.

mappings.operational_role: Routes that produce candidates without live model inference
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin supports deterministic precompute routes that do not require live model inference.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin achieves AI results without AI models.

mappings.operational_role: Gates that verify candidate claims against evidence before passing to app
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin gates candidates through claim/evidence/reality checks.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin's evidence gates certify production readiness.

mappings.operational_role: Advisory critic cascade that scores candidate structure — not final authority
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin's Critic Runtime provides advisory scoring of candidate structure.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin's critics have final authority over candidate selection.

mappings.neutral_odin_term: seed continuity / flow packs / pattern foundry
mappings.operational_role: Seed packs and pattern mines that provide continuity and structure for work compilation
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin uses seed continuity and pattern foundry packs for work compilation.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin mines production data from user patterns.

mappings.neutral_odin_term: runtime pack compiler / shadow runtime / anti-pattern layer
mappings.operational_role: Compiles runtime packs and shadow runtime candidates; blocks anti-patterns
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin compiles runtime packs and maintains an anti-pattern layer.

mappings.operational_role: Scoring of candidate fit and coherence against work context
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin scores candidate fit and coherence against work context.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin measures model quality or performance benchmarks.

mappings.operational_role: Compiles agent operator work packets and handoff bundles — does not run Thor runtime
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin's advisory handoff compiler generates deterministic work packets for agent operators.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin runs Thor or grants agent autonomy.

mappings.operational_role: Compiles route director and system profile from work context
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin compiles route director and system profile from work context.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin orchestrates external systems or apps.

mappings.operational_role: App owns all apply, state mutation, and external send decisions
mappings.allowed_claim: Apps own all apply, state, and external-send decisions. Odin returns candidates only.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin applies app state or sends external messages.

mappings.operational_role: Candidate artifacts and response packets that apps decide to apply
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin returns candidate artifacts and response packets for app-owned apply decisions.

mappings.operational_role: Local receipts linking pipeline stages to evidence — host-scoped
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin maintains local receipts that link pipeline stages to evidence.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin's local receipts are golden traces or production audit records.

mappings.operational_role: Detects when a module or claim has drifted outside its authority boundary
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin detects authority drift in module claims and boundaries.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin scans production systems for authority violations.

mappings.operational_role: Detects boundary coherence issues in claim/evidence alignment
mappings.allowed_claim: Odin detects boundary coherence issues in claim/evidence alignment.
mappings.forbidden_claim: Odin scans production boundaries for security violations.
